column8: Percy Spencer liked chocolate a lot. In the morning, before_________to work, he made sure he had a bar of chocolate with him to eat later on in the day. (GO)

column11: Suddenly, when he put his hand in his pocket, he felt sticky, liquid chocolate. He realised that the radar_________the chocolate bar somehow. (MELT)

column24: They___________five blue zones so far. These include the three mentioned above, together with Okinawa, Japan, and Loma Linda, California. (DISCOVER)
